## Description

A clear description of the feature or improvement you'd like.

## Use Case

What problem does this solve? How would you use it?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe how you expect the feature to work. Include example ECL expressions if relevant:

```ecl
<!-- Example ECL showing desired behavior -->
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.
